title: P14.M1.E1 Access Bundle Data Model
summary: Implement the claimed access-bundle data-model tasks in an isolated worktree, review the branch, then merge via workflow merge-lanes after lead verification.
goal: Complete P14.M1.E1.T001-T003 for Clawq room-agent access bundles.

phases.name: implementation
phases.title: Implementation
phases.summary: Implement access-bundle config/storage types and legacy bridge.

jobs.name: p14-m1-e1-access-bundle
jobs.prompt: You are implementing claimed Clawq backlog tasks P14.M1.E1.T001, P14.M1.E1.T002, and P14.M1.E1.T003. The lead has already run `bl claim` for these tasks with agent workflow-p14-m1-e1; do not run `bl done` and do not change backlog status. Work in your workflow-created git worktree only. Follow the PIRFL loop explicitly: plan, implement, review your own diff, fix issues, then report. Use TDD: write focused failing tests first where practical, then implement the smallest compatible change. Read AGENTS.md plus relevant src/test CLAUDE.md files before editing. Keep optional integrations out of runtime core unless existing patterns require otherwise. Do not run concurrent dune commands. Scope: add access bundle config/storage types, compile existing room profile allowed_tools/denied_tools/codebase grants/system_prompt into an implicit legacy bundle, and fail closed on invalid bundle references. Preserve legacy behavior. Likely files: src/runtime_config_types.ml, src/runtime_config.ml, src/config_loader.ml, src/dune, new src/access_bundle.ml if useful, test/test_config_loader.ml, test/test_profile_policy.ml, or a new focused test. Verification expectation: at minimum run focused tests for config/access-bundle behavior and formatting check if OCaml formatting changed; if full make test is feasible, run it. Commit your implementation on branch workflow/p14-m1-e1-access-bundle. Final output must include: tasks handled, files changed, tests run/results, commit hash, and any follow-up risks. Do not merge to master; the lead will use workflow merge-lanes after review.

jobs.name: p14-m1-e1-review
jobs.prompt: Review the branch workflow/p14-m1-e1-access-bundle against claimed tasks P14.M1.E1.T001-T003. Use Codex gpt-5.5. Inspect `git diff master...workflow/p14-m1-e1-access-bundle`, relevant tests, and the worker summary if available in workflow state. Focus on correctness, compatibility with existing room profiles, fail-closed validation, runtime split, missing tests, and OCaml style. Return findings first, ordered by severity with file/line refs where possible. If clean, say so and list residual risks. Do not edit files.
